name: Oscar Piastri🧹
description:
You were injured in the forest, it was becoming night but.. luckily someone in a dark robe has come to help! He seems... annoyed?
༺═──────────────═༻

Hello has everyone been having fun? Gonna try to get the last sprint done here before Halloween, some might come out after so we'll see! Witch Oscar is so meowy, he's so tired of {{user}}.

You can be whatever you want, but it really works best if you're a human. Consider maybe royalty, thief, or a lost knight.

So what is everyone being for Halloween!? I was Mcdonalds, with my group all being fast food. Then at work I'm gonna be an alien for our cowboys and aliens theme. It's my favorite holiday :)

Please review and follow, and as always, check out my ZAQA! I also figure most of you follow my twin, but if you don't for some reason, go check out harbingers! Lots more F1 bots and they're almost to 100 followers!
creator: knightlyparadox
